5bbb646788ac4f13.source_text: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
5bbb646788ac4f13.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman pwodiksyon tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXIT labèl tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literal mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

81cf480cb2c4d98d.source_text: And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
81cf480cb2c4d98d.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. 3055121551dc4def.source_text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
3055121551dc4def.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. c45422fd74b09bef.source_text: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
c45422fd74b09bef.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. 5c690f124d36717b.source_text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
